name: Workers comp denied my back surgery, appeal in Utah?
description: Appeal to Labor Commission with doctor proof.

mainEntity.name: Workers comp denied my back surgery, appeal in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission with doctor proof.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, request hearing at Labor Commission; prove medical necessity.**

Utah judges order treatment if work-related.[1]

- Independent medical exam.
- Doctor justification.
- Prior authorization denied?

Attorney wins these routinely.[1] Don't delay.
